selectedSlice: Add an exact filtered Student Directory handoff to recent program-scoped Global Admin role assignments when the grant maps to one accessible school.
selectionReason: Current repo evidence showed a real protected-workspace gap, not speculative polish. The workspace already surfaced recent role assignments with readable scope names, school-scoped handoffs, and assigner labels, but program-scoped grants still stopped at passive copy even though /api/admin/role-assignments could safely resolve active school mappings from site_programs and the existing Student Directory already supported exact programId filters. A single-school mapping made this one precise route-backed destination.
candidateShortlist: Broader Global Admin route refresh across Recent Audit, Students, Presentation, Programs, and Users & Access
userFacingImprovement: Global Admin recent role assignments can now open the existing Student Directory filtered to the assigned program when that grant maps to one accessible school, instead of stopping at a passive program label.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice reuses the existing protected /api/admin/role-assignments read path plus the existing Student Directory route and school-switch contract.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundary changed.
Program-scoped role-assignment drill-downs remain Global Admin-only and stay summary-only when the grant maps to multiple schools.

validation.notes: Focused role-assignment route and workspace coverage passed before docs/state closeout, and the full validation ladder passed after the closeout files were updated.

deferred: Role-assignment cohort drill-down depth still needs an exact school-resolution contract.
Broader Global Admin route refresh remains larger than this bounded role-assignment handoff slice.
Filtered Audit cross-school proof still needs a tighter locally provable scenario before another audit pass.
Admin mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise scoped destination.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed hosted runtime and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Viewer email visibility policy still needs a product decision before any UI change.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
nextRecommended: Continue the bounded Global Admin role-assignment refresh only where the current workspace can prove one exact school; inspect cohort-scoped grants next and keep multi-school program grants summary-only until a precise mapped destination exists.
doNotRepeat: Do not auto-open program-scoped Global Admin recent role assignments when the grant maps to multiple accessible schools; keep those rows summary-only until one exact school is proven.
Do not remove scopeSiteIds from /api/admin/role-assignments while the workspace uses that protected mapping to prove exact Student Directory handoffs.
Do not regress the single-school program handoff back to passive role-assignment rows while the existing Student Directory already supports the exact program filter.
